parsed.production_notes: The video uses static AI-generated images animated for lip-syncing. Movements are minimal and unnatural, and faces have characteristic AI smoothness.

characters.appearance: Young adult woman, slim build, fair complexion, dark brown hair. She has a smooth, photorealistic AI appearance.
characters.wardrobe: Brown and grey plaid button-down shirt.
characters.demeanor: Sleepy initially, becoming curious and engaged.

characters.appearance: Humanoid robot with a silver metallic face and glowing purple eyes. Intricate mechanical details are visible on the neck.
characters.wardrobe: Wrapped in a textured, patterned brown shawl.
characters.demeanor: Calm, helpful, and robotic but friendly.

scenes.setting: Dimly lit bedroom at night, warm lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is lying down in bed, resting her head on a blue and white plaid pillow. She is positioned on the right side of the frame, looking slightly downwards. The lighting is soft and warm, suggesting a bedside lamp in a darkened room. The background is blurred, showing hints of a headboard.

Character B is lying down, wrapped snugly in a textured, patterned brown shawl. The robot's silver metallic face and glowing purple eyes are prominent. Warm, dim illumination creates highlights on the metallic surfaces. The background is dark and out of focus.

scenes.visual_description: A split-screen layout showing a young woman in bed on the top half and a humanoid robot in bed on the bottom half. They appear to be having a conversation. Subtitles overlay the center of the screen throughout the scene.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: इतनी रात क्या कर रही हो? [What are you doing so late at night?]
Character A says: आई स्लीप। [I sleep.]
Character B says: आई एम स्लीपिंग बोलना चाहिए। [You should say 'I am sleeping'.]
Character A says: आई एम स्लीपिंग। [I am sleeping.]
Character B says: थोड़ा फॉर्मल में आई एम गेटिंग सम स्लीप भी बोल सकते हैं। [In a slightly more formal way, you can also say 'I am getting some sleep'.]
Character A says: ओ अच्छा इंग्लिश कैसे सीखें? [Oh, okay. How to learn English?]
Character B says: मेरे साथ हर रोज़ बस 15 मिनट डेली प्रैक्टिस करने से काफी है। [Practicing with me for just 15 minutes daily is enough.]
Character B says: एक महीने में ही अपनी इंग्लिश फर्राटेदार कर सकते हो। [You can make your English fluent in just one month.]
Character A says: ये तो महंगा होगा ना। [This must be expensive, right?]
Character B says: सिर्फ ₹1 में इस ऐप को पूरा ट्राय करके देख सकते हो। [You can try this entire app for just ₹1.]
Character B says: लाखों लोग मेरे साथ डेली इंग्लिश सीख रहे हैं। [Lakhs of people are learning English daily with me.]
Character A says: सुपर्ब। कैसे जॉइन करें? [Superb. How to join?]
Character B says: अभी इंग्लिश सीखो ऐप डाउनलोड करके इंग्लिश सीखना शुरू करो। [Download the English Seekho app now and start learning English.]
Character B says: एक्सपर्ट्स के छोटे 2-5 मिनट के वीडियोज़ से सीखो। [Learn from short 2-5 minute videos by experts.]
Character B says: और मेरे साथ जब चाहे प्रैक्टिस करो 24 घंटे अवेलेबल हूँ। [And practice with me whenever you want, I am available 24 hours.]
Character B says: मैं प्रॉमिस करती हूँ तुम्हारा कभी मज़ाक नहीं उड़ाऊंगी। [I promise I will never make fun of you.]
Character A says: सच्ची में अभी डाउनलोड करती हूँ। [Really, I will download it right now.]
Character A says: फिर हम लोग वहां चैट करते हैं। [Then we will chat there.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
इतनी रात क्या कर रही हो? (What are you doing so late at night?)
आई स्लीप (I sleep)
आई एम स्लीपिंग बोलना चाहिए। (You should say 'I am sleeping'.)
आई एम स्लीपिंग (I am sleeping)
थोड़ा फॉर्मल में आई एम गेटिंग सम स्लीप भी बोल सकते हैं। (In a slightly more formal way, you can also say 'I am getting some sleep'.)
ओ अच्छा इंग्लिश कैसे सीखें? (Oh, okay. How to learn English?)
मेरे साथ हर रोज़ बस 15 मिनट डेली प्रैक्टिस करने से काफी है (Practicing with me for just 15 minutes daily is enough)
एक महीने में ही अपनी इंग्लिश फर्राटेदार कर सकते हो। (You can make your English fluent in just one month.)
ये तो महंगा होगा ना (This must be expensive, right)
सिर्फ ₹1 में इस ऐप को पूरा ट्राय करके देख सकते हो। (You can try this entire app for just ₹1.)
लाखों लोग मेरे साथ डेली इंग्लिश सीख रहे हैं। (Lakhs of people are learning English daily with me.)
सुपर्ब (Superb)
कैसे जॉइन करें? (How to join?)
अभी इंग्लिश सीखो ऐप डाउनलोड करके इंग्लिश सीखना शुरू करो। (Download the English Seekho app now and start learning English.)
एक्सपर्ट्स के छोटे 2-5 मिनट के वीडियोज़ से सीखो (Learn from short 2-5 minute videos by experts)
और मेरे साथ जब चाहे प्रैक्टिस करो 24 घंटे अवेलेबल हूँ। (And practice with me whenever you want, I am available 24 hours.)
मैं प्रॉमिस करती हूँ तुम्हारा कभी मज़ाक नहीं उड़ाऊंगी। (I promise I will never make fun of you.)
सच्ची में अभी डाउनलोड करती हूँ। (Really, I will download it right now.)
फिर हम लोग वहां चैट करते हैं। (Then we will chat there.)

panels.panel_visual_description: A sleek smartphone is positioned vertically in the center of the frame against a dark purple background. The background features a subtle grid of dots and glowing, magical particle effects floating around the phone. The phone's screen emits a bright, ethereal glow.

scenes.visual_description: A promotional end-card featuring a smartphone displaying the app's logo and an install button. The background is dark purple with digital particle effects.
scenes.audio_transcript: Unknown speaker says: इनस्टॉल नाउ पे क्लिक करो और अभी इंग्लिश सीखो ऐप डाउनलोड करो। [Click on Install Now and download the English Seekho app now.]

panels.panel_visual_description: A solid, completely black screen with no visible elements, lighting, or textures.

scenes.visual_description: A plain black screen displaying a lengthy legal disclaimer in white text.
scenes.on_screen_text: English Seekho kisi bhi government authority institution brand, organisation ya individual ke dwara endorsed, sponsored, affiliated ya associated nahi hai. Kisi bhi names trademarks logos ya references ka use sirf educational aur informational purposes ke liye kiya gaya hai Kuch content sirf samjhane ke liye dramatised ya representational ho sakta hai English Seekho kisi bhi guaranteed results ka promise nahi karta Outcomes individual effort aur doosre factors par depend karte hain aur vary kar sakte hain.
